fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the template.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the template.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's address. This address will appear on all sales documents for the customer.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's city.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's telephone number.

fields.name: Document Sending Profile
fields.tooltip: Specifies the preferred method of sending documents to this customer.

fields.name: Credit Limit (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum amount of credit that you extend to the customer for their purchases before you issue warnings. The value 0 represents unlimited credit.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default currency for the customer.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer price group code, which you can use to set up special sales prices in the Sales Prices page.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language to be used on printouts for this customer.

fields.name: Statistics Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the statistics group.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code that indicates the payment terms that you require of the customer.

fields.name: Fin. Charge Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to calculate finance charges for the customer.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the salesperson who normally handles this customer's account.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipment method to use when you ship items to the customer.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping company is used when you ship items to the customer.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the invoice discount terms that you have defined for the customer.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer discount group code, which you can use as a criterion to set up special discounts in the Sales Line Discounts page.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies which transactions with the customer that cannot be processed, for example, because the customer is insolvent.

fields.name: Print Statements
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to include this customer when you print the Statement report.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a different customer who will be invoiced for products that you sell to the customer in the Name field on the customer card.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the customer usually submits payment, such as bank transfer or check.

fields.name: Format Region
fields.tooltip: Specifies the region format to be used on printouts for this customer.

fields.name: Application Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to apply payments to entries for this customer.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to show VAT in the Unit Price and Line Amount fields on document lines.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies from which location sales to this customer will be processed by default.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's fax number.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's VAT registration number for customers in EU countries/regions.

fields.name: Combine Shipments
fields.tooltip: Specifies if several orders delivered to the customer can appear on the same sales invoice.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's trade type to link transactions made for this customer with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: GLN
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer in connection with electronic document sending.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: EORI Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Economic Operators Registration and Identification number that is used when you exchange information with the customs authorities due to trade into or out of the European Union.

fields.name: Use GLN in Electronic Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the GLN is used in electronic documents as a party identification number.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's email address.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's home page address.

fields.name: Reminder Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how reminders about late payments are handled for this customer.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that will be used to assign numbers to customers.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer or vendor is liable for sales tax.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's VAT specification to link transactions made for this customer to.

fields.name: Reserve
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether items will never, automatically (Always), or optionally be reserved for this customer.

fields.name: Block Payment Tolerance
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the customer is not allowed a payment tolerance.

fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's intercompany partner code.

fields.name: Prepayment %
fields.tooltip: Specifies a prepayment percentage that applies to all orders for this customer, regardless of the items or services on the order lines.

fields.name: Partner Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies for direct debit collections if the customer that the payment is collected from is a person or a company.

fields.name: Intrastat Partner Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies for Intrastat reporting if the customer is a person or a company.

fields.name: Privacy Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to limit access to data for the data subject during daily operations. This is useful, for example, when protecting data from changes while it is under privacy review.

fields.name: Disable Search by Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can change customer name in the document, because the name is not used in search.

fields.name: Allow Multiple Posting Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies if multiple posting groups can be used for posting business transactions for this customer.

fields.name: Cash Flow Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a payment term that will be used to calculate cash flow for the customer.

fields.name: Contact Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of contact that will be used to create a customer with the template.

fields.name: Mobile Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's mobile telephone number.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that will administer this customer by default.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer accepts partial shipment of orders.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent service to use for this customer.

fields.name: Price Calculation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default price calculation method.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to calculate a sales line discount when a special sales price is offered, according to setup in the Sales Prices page.

fields.name: Base Calendar Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a customizable calendar for shipment planning that holds the customer's working days and holidays.

fields.name: Copy Sell-to Addr. to Qte From
fields.tooltip: Specifies which customer address is inserted on sales quotes that you create for the customer.

fields.name: Validate EU Vat Reg. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the VAT registration number will be specified in the EU VAT Registration No. Check page so that it is validated against the VAT registration number validation service.
